metadata.scheme_name: ST Girl Child Literacy Incentive Amount - Class 11th

raw_data.details: Under this scheme, Scheduled Tribe girl students studying in Class 11 receive financial support from the Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme aims to ensure that girls from SC communities continue their education without financial barriers. Applications are accepted online through the Shiksha Portal, and the eligible amount is directly transferred to the student’s account after verification.
raw_data.benefits: Eligible SC girl students of Class 11 receive an annual financial incentive of ₹3,000, credited directly to their bank account
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant must be a girl student belonging to the Scheduled Caste category of Madhya Pradesh. The student must be continuously studying in Class 11 at a recognized institution. The annual family income should not exceed ₹6,00,000A verified copy of the permanent caste certificate issued by the Sub-Divisional Officer (Revenue) is required. A self-declaration certificate stating that the parent/guardian is not an income tax payer must be submitted. An income certificate or salary certificate issued by a competent authority must be provided.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineTo avail of the benefits under this scheme, eligible students can contact the Principal of their respective government schools/institutions. Note: The student's profile is entered on the education portal [https://shikshaportal.mp.gov.in/](https://shikshaportal.mp.gov.in/) by the teacher of the educational institution as per the record/certificate provided by the student.
raw_data.documents_required: Aadhaar CardCaste Certificate (ST)Domicile CertificateClass 10 MarksheetBank PassbookSchool Admission ProofRecent Passport-size Photograph

To know more please visit Check EligibilityMadhya PradeshST Girl Child Literacy Incentive Amount - Class 11thEducationGirl StudentScholarshipDetailsUnder this scheme, Scheduled Tribe girl students studying in Class 11 receive financial support from the Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme aims to ensure that girls from SC communities continue their education without financial barriers. Applications are accepted online through the Shiksha Portal, and the eligible amount is directly transferred to the student’s account after verification. BenefitsEligible SC girl students of Class 11 receive an annual financial incentive of ₹3,000, credited directly to their bank accountEligibilityThe applicant must be a girl student belonging to the Scheduled Caste category of Madhya Pradesh. The student must be continuously studying in Class 11 at a recognized institution. The annual family income should not exceed ₹6,00,000A verified copy of the permanent caste certificate issued by the Sub-Divisional Officer (Revenue) is required. A self-declaration certificate stating that the parent/guardian is not an income tax payer must be submitted. An income certificate or salary certificate issued by a competent authority must be provided. Application ProcessOfflineTo avail of the benefits under this scheme, eligible students can contact the Principal of their respective government schools/institutions. Note: The student's profile is entered on the education portal [https://shikshaportal.mp.gov.in/](https://shikshaportal.mp.gov.in/) by the teacher of the educational institution as per the record/certificate provided by the student. Documents RequiredAadhaar CardCaste Certificate (ST)Domicile CertificateClass 10 MarksheetBank PassbookSchool Admission ProofRecent Passport-size PhotographFrequently Asked QuestionsWho can apply for this scheme? You can track it on www.shikshaportal.mp.gov.in . What is the main objective of this scheme? To encourage ST girl students to continue their education after Class 10. Is this a state or central scheme? It is a state scheme implemented by the School Education Department, Madhya Pradesh. How much financial aid is provided? ₹3,000 per year is given to each eligible student. Who uploads the student details online? The respective school authorities upload the data. How can I apply for the scheme? Applications are made online through the [Shiksha Portal](https://www.shikshaportal.mp.gov.in) . Is there any application fee? No, the application is completely free of cost. How will the amount be disbursed? The amount is directly transferred to the student’s bank account. Is there any deadline for application submission? Dates are notified on the Shiksha Portal. Where can I check the status of my application? You can track it on www.shikshaportal.mp.gov.in . Sources And References[Guideline](https://www.cmhelpline.mp.gov.in/KnowYourEntitleDetail.aspx?status=ByVibhag&pointvalue=2&Schemeid=379)OkWas this helpful?
raw_data.scheme_name: ST Girl Child Literacy Incentive Amount - Class 11th

faqs.question: Who can apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: You can track it on www.shikshaportal.mp.gov.in .

faqs.question: What is the main objective of this scheme?
faqs.answer: To encourage ST girl students to continue their education after Class 10.

faqs.question: Is this a state or central scheme?
faqs.answer: It is a state scheme implemented by the School Education Department, Madhya Pradesh.

faqs.question: How much financial aid is provided?
faqs.answer: ₹3,000 per year is given to each eligible student.

faqs.question: Who uploads the student details online?
faqs.answer: The respective school authorities upload the data.

faqs.question: How can I apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applications are made online through the [Shiksha Portal](https://www.shikshaportal.mp.gov.in) .

faqs.question: Is there any application fee?
faqs.answer: No, the application is completely free of cost.

faqs.question: How will the amount be disbursed?
faqs.answer: The amount is directly transferred to the student’s bank account.

faqs.question: Is there any deadline for application submission?
faqs.answer: Dates are notified on the Shiksha Portal.

faqs.question: Where can I check the status of my application?
faqs.answer: You can track it on www.shikshaportal.mp.gov.in .
